evidence.source_title: Hossein Mousavi Tabrizi: From Engineering Massacres to Wearing the Reformist Mantle
evidence.description: Mousavi Tabrizi married into the family of Hossein Noori Hamedani around 1968, making Noori Hamedani his father-in-law.

editorial_notes: Noori Hamedani is Mousavi Tabrizi's father-in-law. Marriage circa 1968 strengthened ties between bazaar and clergy.
